title: Incorrect handling of non-octal digits in octal string escape sequence

features.name: octal escape with invalid digit 9
features.description: Code should include a string literal with an octal escape sequence containing the digit 9, which is not a valid octal digit

features.name: octal escape with invalid digit 8
features.description: Code should include a string literal with an octal escape sequence containing the digit 8, which is not a valid octal digit

features.name: short single-digit octal escape in string
features.description: Code should include a string literal with a single-digit octal escape sequence followed by another escape sequence

features.name: mixed valid and invalid octal escapes in string
features.description: Code should include a string literal with both valid 3-digit octal escapes and invalid octal escapes using digits 8 or 9
